asset_type: Product-led TaraHome technical blog cover for an Amazon Echo Thread and Home Assistant troubleshooting guide
source_mode: Official vendor photography selected without generative editing
selection_brief: Choose a current official Amazon photograph with a recognizable Echo Thread border router on a warm residential wall, a restrained dark-green accent, and a composition that survives centered 16:9 card and 16:10 hero crops.
constraints: No embedded article title, no fake hardware, no diagrams, no decorative network paths, no translucent panels, no inset frames, no floating UI cards, no progress bars, and no generic fallback artwork.
